channel.title: Markdown on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: Margo: The Presentation Engine for the AI Era
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Margo is a markdown-native, highly scriptable presentation tool designed for the age of AI agents, bridging the gap between developer workflows and presentation decks.
